feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business Technology Platform
feed.subtitle: SAP Business Technology Platform Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Cloud Foundry memory plan required for HTML5 apps?
entry.content:
Hello community,

I’d appreciate insights on whether CF memory assignment is essential in this specific scenario.

 

[Scencrio overview]

I’m working on developing and deploying a Fiori app to the managed approuter. Here's the approach I’ve followed:

  1. Develop a Fiori app in Build Code within the Dev subaccount.
  2. Prepare the Deploy subaccount by enabling Cloud Foundry (CF), subscribing to Build Work Zone (standard edition), and the XSUAA application plan.
  3. Deploy the Fiori app to the Deploy subaccount's HTML5 application repository, which is enabled via Build Work Zone.

This scenario is thoroughly explained in the mission "Get Started on SAP BTP with SAPUI5/Fiori - Create a Hello World App" available here: https://discovery-center.cloud.sap/missiondetail/3585/3628/ .

 

[Question]

The mission suggests assigning CF memory to the Deploy subaccount. However, I’m wondering if this step is truly necessary.

From my understanding, a Fiori app is a frontend application that the HTML5 application repository can serve. Without assigning CF memory, I was able to successfully deploy the app to the HTML5 Applications repository and run the app. The underlying services were also deployed to the CF space using the free dependent services.

Btw, I recognize that assigning CF memory is typically required for full-stack applications with a standalone app-router scenario, where the application itself is deployed to the CF space.

 

Regards
EunSeok

entry.title: Couldn't subscribe to Integration Suite.
entry.content:
please help me on the below error message while subscribing to integration suite

 

Couldn't subscribe to Integration Suite. Try again. If the problem persists, please post a question to SAP Community.

entry.title: Issue Assign Roles From Trust Configuration in Account Trial
entry.content:
Dear Experts

I wan know what is the reason that in my Accout Trial the "Default Identity Provide" Appear disabled, 

The first image is as appear in the blog and tutorials and the second as appear in my account trial.

 

I should some service?

Regards

entry.title: How to use the multiselect combobox feature
entry.content:
I want the selected values from the combo box should get listed in the list repeat The value is not getting stored in the selected section can someone please guide me

 

@Dan_Wroblewski 
@merituulimelkko

entry.title: How to mashup and combine external entity with custom entity for BTP CAP?
entry.content:
I have constructed SBS application which consumes the external service data using destination from SaaS SAP system. Now I would like to use some custom properties of my own together with ready entity definition from external service. Unfortunately, I have error when I try to combine. Using "extend" or "extend projection" does not work either.

Is there anyway how to fix this issue? Thanks.

Entity definition:

entity getPromoCustom as select from ex.Promotions {
    key promotionID,
    promotionName,
};
extend getPromoCustom with {
    salesOrg   : String(4);
    distChain  : String(4);
};
 
Error:
Use ‘extend projection’ to add select items to the query entityCDS (compiler)(extend-query)

entry.title: Why the error loop on a Fiori Elements application when running on SAP Work Zone(Launchpad)
entry.content:
I wrote a CAP application with a Fiori Elements, business as usual.

When writing an event handler, I wanted to reject, return an error, if certain condition is met:

this.on('READ', 'MyEntity', async (req) => {
  // ...
  if (!filter) {
    req.reject(500,'Please select a filter.');
  }
  // ...
  return result;
});

What happens is that, if I run the application standalone, locally, or in BTP's HTML5 Repository, it behaves correctly. When an error happens it returns the error and stops. I fix the input and the app runs fine:

One error

 

However, if I run it on SAP WorkZone, standard edition (former Launchpad), either in BTP or using the cds-launchpad-plugin, it enters in an infinite error loop:

Infinite errors

and the list keeps growing. If I close the error screen it immediately re-opens and keeps outputting more errors. The only way to stop it is to exit the page.

To share some light on what's happening, it keeps sending the same "wrong" request. If I put a breakpoint in my application it will hold and stop the loop. But as soon as I release it, the front-end fails and sends the same request again.

The workaround I had to do was to catch the error and return a valid response:

try {
  //...
} catch (e) {
  // throw e; // doesn't work
  // req.reject(e.message); // doesn't work
  console.error(e.message); // log for information
  // return a valid object, but fill the values with the error information
  return [{
    title: "ERROR",
    description: e.message
  }];
}

 

Let me know if you faced something similar and if you know how to stop this infinite loop.

entry.title: How to Edit and Annotate an Image in SAP MDK?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I have a requirement in SAP MDK where an image is displayed on a mdk page, and I need to:

  1. Edit the image directly within the app.
  2. Add inline annotations, such as text or highlights, on top of the image.

Is there any standard control or feature in SAP MDK to achieve this functionality? If not, are there any compatible NativeScript plugins or workarounds to implement this in SAP MDK?

Any guidance, documentation links, or examples would be greatly appreciated!

Thank you,
Divan Wellalage

entry.title: But in my laptop windows 11 I cannot find this service named sap cloud connect. how to find service?
entry.content: But in my laptop windows 11 I cannot find this service named sap cloud connect. how to find service?

entry.title: Alternative for Advanced Financial Closing
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there a non-BTP alternative of Advanced Financial Cockpit? I noticed that Advanced Financial cockpit incurs a very high cost, and as per the below note, since the mentioned Business Functions are active for us, it looks like the only solution, and classical Closing Cockpit cannot be used. However, Our usage is not so much so as to benefit from so high a cost.

2547 - S4TWL - Closing Cockpit with S/4HANA OP 

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Unable to activate Account for Identity Authentication Service via email link
entry.content:
Sometime back today(4th of Jan 2025) received an email for activating the account for SAP Build apps for Identity Authentication service , I am unable to activate after clicking activation button via email link and after doing copy & paste url in browser also not working the link which shared in the email body.

 

When i access the link , i can see that 'Hmm page cant be reachable' and also attached error msg for the reference.

 

Please help me with the right link to activate right link for Identity Authentication service.

entry.title: Error An internal error occurred during message processing. Please check the logs in the Monitor Sys
entry.content:
I have an error when call the following iflow :

 

<soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://www.w3.org/2003/05/soap-envelope">
<soap:Body>
<soap:Fault>
<soap:Code>
<soap:Value>soap:Receiver</soap:Value>
</soap:Code>
<soap:Reason>
<soap:Text xml:lang="en">An internal error occurred during message processing. Please check the logs in the Monitor System Logs</soap:Text>
</soap:Reason>
</soap:Fault>
</soap:Body>
</soap:Envelope>

I check the Monitor System Logs and get two files , however I dont understand the cause.

Other iflows work fine, and the user have the role ESBMessaging

Regards

entry.title: Connect to MSSQL Database from SAP BTP CAPM application
entry.content:
Hi All,

 

  1. We have a capm application, in which we are trying to connect to to Microsoft SQL Server using mssql npm package
  2. While doing so, we are encountering an issue while connection to database.
  3. I’m adding the code snippet and error screenshot that we are encountering while reaching the database. Please let us know how can we connect to MSSQL database from CAPM application. I have also used sequelize to connect to the database, but still couldn't able to connect.

const cds = require('@sap/cds');

const sql = require('mssql');

 

module.exports = cds.service.impl(async function () {

  this.on('READ', 'YourEntity', async (req) => {

    try {

      // SQL Server Connection Config

      const config = {

        user: process.env.SQL_USER,

        password: process.env.SQL_PASSWORD,

        server: process.env.SQL_SERVER,

        database: process.env.SQL_DATABASE,

        options: {

          encrypt: true, // Use encryption if necessary

          trustServerCertificate: true // Change to false in production

        }

      };

 

      // Connect to SQL Server

      const pool = await sql.connect(config);

      const result = await pool.request().query('SELECT * FROM YourTable');

 

      return result.recordset;

    } catch (err) {

      console.error(err);

      req.reject(500, 'Error connecting to SQL Server');

    }

  });

});

 

Regards,

Kowsalyaa Kumar

entry.title: Enabling Access to SAP UI5 Applications for Non-BTP Users
entry.content:
I have developed an SAP UI5 application in Business Application Studio (BAS) and deployed it to Cloud Foundry. The application is now visible under HTML5 Applications in the SAP BTP Cockpit. I would like to understand how users without an SAP BTP account can access this application. Specifically, is it possible for users created in SAP Cloud Identity Services (IAS) to access this UI5 application?

Best Regards,

Khaing Zin

entry.title: Are there open-source or cost-effective alternatives for deploying UI5 apps outside of BTP and Kyma?
entry.content:
Currently, I am running a UI5 app on the Kyma runtime provided by SAP BTP. While this setup works well for seamless integration with SAP systems, I am exploring open-source or more cost-effective alternatives for deploying UI5 apps outside the SAP BTP ecosystem.

Thanks

entry.title: Error in SAP BTP after Custom UI5 app deploy
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am facing issue while running custom Fiori UI5 app in BTP CF. It’s running fine in BAS preview but showing internal server error message after deploying the UI5 code in BTP CF.  Please suggest how to resolve it.

Error message in log file in BTP CF:

GET request to /7fc513a7-ec39-4d08-a074-c6a6f4933e81.comcfnote.comcfnote-0.0.1 completed with status 500 xs-app.json/routes/5: Missing required property: source

 

Thanks and Regards,

 Jyoti Prakash Das

entry.title: Can I extend the self-registration for SAP Cloud Identity Services
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I want to enable the self-registration for an application registered in our SAP Cloud Identity Services tenant. Activating the self-registration and adding some information available in "User Attributes for Access" is fine and working.

But, we also want the user to enter the "Login name" (which we use as SSO attribute). Unfortunately, we cannot add this to the self-registration form. As we only allow internal users we could probably call an API to determine the Login name based on the email address as this would be available in a central repository.

How can ensure that the login name is set on self registration (either by entering in the according form or by some logic) before the first real login of the user?

entry.title: Can't choose Cloud Foundry when create Project in BAS
entry.content:
When I create new Project BAS, if I choose Data source = Connect to a System, can't choose Cloud Foundry in deployment configuration.

As I created before I can choose Cloud Foundry.

Could you please help me to solve this issue?

Best Regards,

Khaing Zin

entry.title: Can we use SAP AI core to deploy the application through Docker Image and use the application from E
entry.content:
I have followed some of Tutorials of SAP AI core. But I am not getting the correct way to deploy the Application using Docker Image and use it later on via an Endpoint. 

I have Chatbot appliation. I have created the Docker compose file because it has two containers running on sideto make the application working. I have no idea how to deploy the application to SAP AI core and use an application via its endpoint.

Could anyone explain me this ?

entry.title: Condition using a String function
entry.content:
Greetings experts, I am trying to use the endsWith function in as a condition, but I keeping getting an error that says 'type not found for variable "endsWith" '. I have included the Core SDK to use the function.

What I am trying to do is that I am evaluating attachments in Outlook (using the Outlook SDK), and all the attachments that end with .pdf are the attachments that I want to process? But I cannot get the endsWith function to work and I cannot find any documentation that shows an example of this.

SAP Build Process Automation SAP Business Technology Platform

entry.title: Is it necessary to separate B1i application and database?
entry.content:
Hey guys familiar with B1i,

I am using B1 10.0 and B1i  1.0.  Recently I’ve encountered issues with B1i performance. The message log keeps reporting "XCE208 Resource is busy" error while handling the event message. It's not always but sometimes. I login the B1i server and it seems the integration service and SQL Server take up most of the memory, reaches to 90%.

I used to be a dotnet developer. In my book, it's always a good design to deploy the application and database to standalone server since they are both memory intense services.

So my question is  should I separate B1i application and database to different server? Is it risky or will be benefit for the B1i performance? It will be great if we have the answer from the B1 official answer.

Thanks!

#SAP B1  #SAP B1i
